metadata.description: Claude Code plugins and MCP connectors for crypto research

plugins.name: setup-skills-master-mcp
plugins.description: Install and configure the skills-master MCP server for Claude Code. Trigger: /setup-skills-master-mcp

connectors.name: x-research-mcp
connectors.description: X/Twitter research via MCP — bearer token auth, 5 tools

connectors.name: netrows-x-mcp
connectors.description: X/Twitter research via Netrows API — no X developer account needed, 14 tools

connectors.name: tavily-mcp
connectors.description: Real-time web search via Tavily AI — research and fact-checking
